intro: Auth0 is freemium; Corbado is priced on request. Auth0: Identity platform with SSO, MFA, social login, and enterprise federation supporting 30+ SDKs and 50+ integrations. Corbado: Identity / Auth / User Management tool for developers. Specializes in Passkey Authentication. Auth0 fits enterprise — in practice, enterprise needing SAML/SCIM with complex rules. Corbado fits apps, B2B — in practice, apps needing SSO/MFA. On our rubric Auth0 scores 5/5 for developer experience and 4/5 for transparency, while Corbado scores 3/5 and 2/5. The honest trade-off: Auth0's main drawback — Expensive for costs — Auth0 gets expensive fast at scale; Corbado's — Internal tools with basic auth. Auth0 is explicitly not the right pick for budget projects. Corbado is not aimed at internal, Static projects. Another Auth0 advantage: Existing Okta customer extending to CIAM. Another Corbado advantage: B2B requiring SAML/SCIM. Another Auth0 friction point: Need pre-built UI components — Clerk is better. Another Corbado friction point: Static sites without user accounts. Our read on Auth0: best for enterprise needing saml/scim with complex rules. Auth0 offers freemium, paid from $5.
quick_take: Auth0 is for enterprise; Corbado is for apps, B2B; decide on pricing model.
verdict_a: Choose Auth0 if your work looks like enterprise needing SAML/SCIM with complex rules, and if portability and keeping the exit door open matter.
verdict_b: Choose Corbado if your work looks like apps needing SSO/MFA, and if you're comfortable requesting a quote before committing.

faq.a: Corbado's pricing isn't published in our data, so we can't give a definitive comparison. Auth0 uses freemium pricing. You'll need to request a Corbado quote to compare directly.

faq.q: Can I migrate from Auth0 to Corbado?
faq.a: Migrating out of Auth0 is straightforward — it's rated low lock-in (Auth migration is painful but doable). The harder question is how deeply you commit to Corbado afterward, since it sits at medium lock-in (Passkey auth, standards-based). Plan the forward cost, not just the exit.

faq.q: Which has better developer experience, Auth0 or Corbado?
faq.a: Auth0 scores higher in our rubric (5/5 vs 3/5 for Corbado). Transparency is 4/5 for Auth0 and 2/5 for Corbado. DX scores are rubric-based, not benchmarks, so evaluate against your own toolchain.

faq.q: Is Corbado a good alternative to Auth0?
faq.a: They sit in the same category, so yes — Corbado is a plausible alternative for many Auth0 use cases. It fits best when apps, B2B. Skip it if internal, Static projects.
